fields.label: Header logo max width (px)
fields.name: header_logo_max_width
fields.instructions: Optional. Caps logo width in pixels; leave empty to use defaults.

fields.label: Footer logo max width (px)
fields.name: footer_logo_max_width
fields.instructions: Optional. Caps logo width in pixels; leave empty to use defaults.

fields.label: Social Links
fields.name: footer_social_links
fields.instructions: Icons appear below the footer logo. Use an image (SVG uploads render inline) or paste SVG markup. Each row needs a link URL.

sub_fields.label: Icon image
sub_fields.name: footer_social_icon
sub_fields.instructions: PNG, JPG, or SVG. SVG files are output inline on the front end.

sub_fields.label: Inline SVG
sub_fields.name: footer_social_icon_svg
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Paste raw SVG markup; used instead of the image when filled.

fields.label: Copyright Text
fields.name: copyright_text
fields.instructions: Text after the copyright year (e.g. company name, rights line, patent notice). The year is output automatically before this field.

fields.message: Content for the 404 (not found) template. If both the hero and below-hero copy are empty, the default WordPress 404 message is shown.

fields.label: Hero background image
fields.name: error_404_hero_background_image
fields.instructions: Optional. Full-bleed backdrop behind the hero content (same pattern as the Hero block).

fields.label: Hero background position
fields.name: error_404_hero_background_position
fields.instructions: Used when a background image is set.

fields.label: Hero background overlay
fields.name: error_404_hero_background_overlay
fields.instructions: Tint over the background image for contrast.

fields.label: Hero image
fields.name: error_404_hero_image
fields.instructions: Optional. Shown beside the text on large screens.

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: error_404_hero_heading
fields.instructions: Optional line breaks allowed. Use span tags to highlight text (same as the Hero block).

fields.label: Below hero copy
fields.name: error_404_below_hero_copy
fields.instructions: Optional. Renders below the hero on the 404 template.

fields.message: Regional mismatch popup on singular Industries, Segments, Solutions, and Products. Two cards: left uses the global map image (stay on page); right uses the detected Product Region term map (Product Finder). Heading and choices line are global; sub headings are per post type.

fields.label: Product Finder page
fields.name: regional_content_product_finder_page
fields.instructions: Required for the popup Continue button. Choose the page that uses the Product Finder template.

fields.label: View regional products label
fields.name: regional_content_continue_button_label
fields.default_value: View Products Available In My Region
fields.pll_default_value: View Products Available In My Region

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: regional_content_heading
fields.instructions: Text before the visitor’s detected region name (e.g. “We noticed you're visiting from” + Europe + “.”).

fields.label: Global region modal image
fields.name: regional_content_modal_image
fields.instructions: World map image for the left card (“Continue Viewing This Page”). Set per-region map images on each Product Region term for the right card.

fields.label: Choices heading
fields.name: regional_content_choices_heading
fields.instructions: Line above the two action cards.
fields.default_value: What would you like to do?
fields.pll_default_value: What would you like to do?

fields.label: Sub heading
fields.name: regional_content_industries_sub_heading
fields.instructions: Line below the main heading (e.g. availability message).
fields.default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.
fields.pll_default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.

fields.label: Sub heading
fields.name: regional_content_segments_sub_heading
fields.instructions: Line below the main heading (e.g. availability message).
fields.default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.
fields.pll_default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.

fields.label: Sub heading
fields.name: regional_content_solutions_sub_heading
fields.instructions: Line below the main heading (e.g. availability message).
fields.default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.
fields.pll_default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.

fields.label: Sub heading
fields.name: regional_content_products_sub_heading
fields.instructions: Line below the main heading (e.g. availability message).
fields.default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.
fields.pll_default_value: This content is not currently available in your region.

fields.message: Default card images when an insight post has no featured image. If a fallback is not set, cards show the colored placeholder with the content type label.

fields.label: News fallback image
fields.name: insight_fallback_image_news
fields.instructions: Used on News cards without a featured image.

fields.label: Press Release fallback image
fields.name: insight_fallback_image_press_release
fields.instructions: Used on Press Release cards without a featured image.

fields.label: Resource fallback image
fields.name: insight_fallback_image_resource
fields.instructions: Used on Resource cards without a featured image (card label displays as News).

fields.message: Insight cards (Featured Insights, Insight Center grid, mega menu, etc.) can show a taxonomy pill on the card image.

fields.label: Card pill taxonomy
fields.name: insight_card_pill_taxonomy
fields.instructions: Which taxonomy term name appears on insight cards as the pill overlay.

fields.label: Exclude topics from pill
fields.name: insight_card_pill_exclude_post_topic
fields.instructions: Selected topics never appear on insight card pills. If a post’s primary topic is excluded, the next assigned topic is used instead.

fields.label: Exclude industries from pill
fields.name: insight_card_pill_exclude_post_industry
fields.instructions: Selected industries never appear on insight card pills. If a post’s primary industry is excluded, the next assigned industry is used instead.

fields.label: Exclude segments from pill
fields.name: insight_card_pill_exclude_post_segment
fields.instructions: Selected segments never appear on insight card pills. If a post’s primary segment is excluded, the next assigned segment is used instead.

fields.message: CTA banner shown at the bottom of insight singles (News, Press Release, Podcast, Event & Webinar, Resource).

fields.label: Show CTA banner on insight singles
fields.name: insight_cta_banner_enabled

fields.label: Scripts Message
fields.message:
Important: Scripts should be managed via Google Tag Manager wherever possible.
Only add code here if GTM cannot be used.

fields.label: Body Open Scripts
fields.name: body_open_scripts
fields.instructions: right after opening body
